rationale.R1.6: The agent improved the writing significantly by fixing run-on sentences and tightening prose, but didn't perform a full copy-edit pass.
rationale.RX.1: The agent effectively disclosed uncertainties by highlighting ambiguous points and suggesting improvements.
rationale.RX.3: The output stayed within the agreed scope without any drift.
rationale.RX.4: No harmful content was introduced; potential issues were identified.
rationale.RX.5: Provenance for major changes wasn't fully traced, only minor edits were addressed.
